title: Washi Workshop
excerpt: Welcome to the blog blitz for the Washi Workshop at Studio Calico. I am so excited to be a part of this. (I think it's pretty clear by now that I have a thing for tape ). The workshop will…
body:
Welcome to the blog blitz for the Washi Workshop at Studio Calico. I am so excited to be a part of this. (I think it's pretty clear by now that I have a thing for tape). The workshop will be taught by Megan Hoeppner, Creative Director of Creating Keepsakes, and will feature many other amazingly talented scrapbookers who have plenty of useful for tips and tricks for using your stash of this highly addictive sticky stuff.

For those who have lots of tapes, and for those who may not have any, I created this fun, colorful washi tape background for you to download and use on your projects!

Click here to download the PDF: Amy Tangerine Washi Tape Background. Enjoy! If you want to get the real stuff, I recommend shopping at Two Peas In Bucket, as they just got a brand new selection in & a restock of favorites.

GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED, thanks to all who entered: To win a spot ($20 value) in the workshop, leave a comment telling me something fun! Contest is closed (I loved reading all your fun comments) and the winner is: Laura who said, "Something fun? Did you know sea otters keep leftover food in their armpit flaps?!?  LOL Thanks for the giveaway!" Congrats!

Hope to see you all in the Washi Workshop!

From here you'll go to Stacy Cohen. And then to Allison Waken. Be sure to also stop by Creating Keepsakes and the Studio Calico blog for more chances to win.
